The '''medium style''' of [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]] was a style used by [[New Jedi Order]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] such as [[Kyle Katarn]] and [[Jaden Korr]].

==Description==
An intermediate style between the [[Fast style|fast]] and the [[strong style]]s, the medium style was based on a perfect equilibrium between speed and power. More often than not, the medium style was the first taught to a lightsaber duelist. It was simple in technique, yet more technical and powerful forms could be built from its foundation.<ref name="Jedi Outcast">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''</ref><ref name="Jedi Academy">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>

Users of the medium style would typically utilize a neutral stance, the lightsaber being held in medium position in front of the user ready for both defensive and offensive maneuvers.<ref name="Jedi Outcast" /><ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Applications==
[[File:Theyareanimals.jpg|thumb|left|A Jedi using the medium style to dispose of two [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]].]]
The medium style struck a balance between the powerful but slow swings of the strong style and the short but swift strikes of the fast style. The medium style was very simple in design, and that is both a strength and weakness. It was an excellent style to fall back onto when nothing else worked, and could provide a respectable offense and defense. It could effectively combat blasters and hold less skilled lightsaber duelist at bay. However, more skilled gunslingers (such as [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]) or more talented lightsaber duelists (such as [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]) would very rapidly break a medium style defense. The same holds true in offense, as a skilled duelist would rapidly destroy the user's momentum and counterattack.<ref name="Jedi Outcast" /><ref name="Jedi Academy" />

This style bore some similarities to the [[Form I/Legends|Shii-Cho]] and [[Form VI/Legends|Niman]] forms of the [[Jedi/Legends|Old Jedi Order]], both combining elements of multiple combat forms, yet being simple and basic.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''
